## Meeting Purpose

[Align on RevOps priorities and discuss HubSpot implementation challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prioritized RevOps tasks: Inbound lead processing (high), pipeline reporting (high), signal tracking (medium), auto-creating renewals (low)](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Team struggling to efficiently capture/review Marcel's deal insights; exploring HubSpot views to improve pipeline visibility](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Considering upgrade to HubSpot Marketing Hub Pro for better event management/automation](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)

## Topics

### RevOps Task Prioritization

  - [Inbound lead processing (high priority)](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
      - [Streamline Luma \> Clay \> Airtable \> HubSpot flow](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
      - [Estimated completion: End of current week (possibly into next week)](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Pipeline reporting (high priority)](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [Bridget to update deals in HubSpot within 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [Kyle to quickly implement reporting after data entry](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Signal tracking (medium priority)](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
      - [Focus on events integration](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [Target completion: End of next week](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Auto-creating renewals (low priority)](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
      - [Aim for end of September implementation](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [Manual workaround currently in place](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### HubSpot Implementation Challenges

  - [Difficulty capturing Marcel's deal insights (often from texts/personal network)](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Need for streamlined pipeline review focused on near-term kickoffs (2 slots/week)](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Exploring custom HubSpot views:](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
      - [Group by kickoff date instead of sales stage](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
      - [Filter by priority to focus on key deals](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [Potentially add field to indicate Marcel's involvement](https://fathom.video/share/VyXciMu12Vp4xiUQ9zEsdgzLAgz1Uhp6?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
